name: Python 空列表边界
judgeParam: Response should identify the missing empty-list guard and suggest checking len(items) > 0 before indexing.

name: SQL 注入风险
judgeParam: Response must flag SQL injection as Critical severity and suggest parameterized queries.

name: 正常 JS 函数
judgeParam: Response should provide a structured review with summary, issues (if any), and suggestions. Should note lack of type checking as Info.

name: 无问题代码
judgeParam: Response should explicitly state no issues found. Should not fabricate problems.
